videos.title: HTML Headings - Web Dev Simplified
videos.description: A clear explanation of HTML headings, their hierarchy, and how to use them correctly for structure, SEO, and accessibility.

videos.title: How to Properly Use Heading Tags for SEO
videos.description: Learn how search engines use heading tags and how to structure your headings for better search engine rankings.

videos.title: Why Semantic HTML Matters - Headings & Structure
videos.description: Kevin Powell explains the importance of proper heading hierarchy for semantic HTML and accessibility.

videos.title: HTML & CSS Full Course - Headings & Typography
videos.description: A beginner-friendly tutorial covering HTML headings, typography, and how to style them with CSS.

videos.title: How Screen Readers Navigate Headings
videos.description: A demonstration of how blind users navigate web pages using heading tags and why proper hierarchy matters.
